TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 
100 
DRUG_UTLZTN_CD 
LABEL: 
Drug Utilization Code 
DESCRIPTION: A code indicating the conflict, intervention and outcome of a prescription presented for fulfillment. 
SHORT NAME: DRUG_UTLZTN_CD 
LONG NAME: DRUG_UTLZTN_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
6 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
RX line 
VALUES: 
Six-character field that concatenates three two-digit codes.
